challenges.prompt: Typing in this input does nothing. Why?
options: The input is controlled by state but has no onChange, so React never updates it — add onChange={e => setName(e.target.value)}
challenges.explanation: Setting value={name} makes it controlled, but without onChange the state never changes, so the field is frozen. Pair value with onChange to update state on each keystroke.

challenges.prompt: Submitting this form reloads the whole page. What's missing?
options: Call e.preventDefault() in handleSubmit to stop the browser's default full-page reload
Buttons can't submit forms in React
challenges.explanation: By default a form submit reloads the page. Call e.preventDefault() at the top of the handler to keep it a single-page interaction.

challenges.prompt: Complete the change handler that keeps state in sync with the input.
challenges.explanation: The event's target is the input element; e.target.value is the current text the user typed. Passing it to setQ keeps state synced with the field.
